title: Height Difference Filter Feature
description:
Properties:
• description ({ identifier })
• min_required_upward_height_diff (int)
• min_required_downward_height_diff (int)
• max_allowed_upward_height_diff (int)
• max_allowed_downward_height_diff (int)
• search_radius (int)

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The name of this feature in the form 'namespace_name:feature_name'. 'feature_name' must match the filename.

min_required_upward_height_diff.title: Min Required Upward Height Diff
min_required_upward_height_diff.description: Specifies the minimum height difference required upwards.

min_required_downward_height_diff.title: Min Required Downward Height Diff
min_required_downward_height_diff.description: Specifies the minimum height difference required downwards.

max_allowed_upward_height_diff.title: Max Allowed Upward Height Diff
max_allowed_upward_height_diff.description: Specifies the maximum height difference allowed upwards.

max_allowed_downward_height_diff.title: Max Allowed Downward Height Diff
max_allowed_downward_height_diff.description: Specifies the maximum height difference allowed downwards.

search_radius.title: Search Radius
search_radius.description: 'search_radius' specifies the the length in each cardinal direction the filter will check for blocks against the given differences.

defaultSnippets.label: Height Difference Filter Feature
defaultSnippets.description: Create a Height Difference Filter Feature
